title: File Path
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries a single file system path as a plain-text string, used to identify the location of an input or output file on disk.

## When to use
Use this type when a machine needs to read from or write to a specific file, rather than receiving content inline. Prefer inline content media types when the file is small and the path adds unnecessary indirection.

## Notes
The path must not contain null bytes. Relative or absolute paths are both valid; the interpretation is determined by the machine's runtime context. For multiple paths, use [File Path Array](https://capdag.com/browse/media:file-path;textable;list) instead.
